description: Mercure is an open protocol and reference hub for pushing real-time updates over Server-Sent Events. The mercure.rocks site provides the specification, self-hosted hub software, and a managed cloud service for running Mercure hubs.
summary: mercure.rocks documents one HTTP integration surface: the Mercure Hub endpoint at `/.well-known/mercure`, used for publish and subscribe over HTTP/SSE with JWT-based auth (Bearer header or auth cookie, with anonymous subscribe optionally configurable).
